channel.title: Posts on abund4nt Blog's
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on abund4nt Blog's

item.title: Multiples of 3 or 5 - Codewars
item.description:
The description of the kata reads as follows.

If we list all the natural numbers below 10 that are multiples of 3 or 5, we get 3, 5, 6 and 9. The sum of these multiples is 23.

Finish the solution so that it returns the sum of all the multiples of 3 or 5 below the number passed in.

Additionally, if the number is negative, return 0.

Note: If the number is a multiple of both 3 and 5, only count it once.

Then starting from the provided natural number, we must follow the following steps to obtain the correct result. First, we list all the natural numbers that are less than the number entered. Then, we identify which of these numbers are multiples of 3 or 5. Finally, we add these multiples to obtain the final result.

item.title: Pentesting Mobile Setup
item.description:
The purpose of this article is to guide in the creation of an environment to perform dynamic audits of mobile applications using Frida. Upon completion, it will demonstrate how to bypass SSL Pinning on Instagram as a practical example. The following tools must be installed.

  • adb
  • Genymotion (emulador de Android)
  • Burpsuite (proxy para interceptar trafico)
  • Frida

Creation of the working environment.

We will start by opening Genymotion and adding a new device, in this case we will use the Google Pixel 3 XL and leave the default settings, next next next next and next. Once installed it should look like this.
